<!-- design-phase-complete-586 -->

Phase summary: routine disposition cites the artifact that already settles the concern.

```yaml
finding_dispositions:
  schema_version: 1
  passes_run: [2]
  entries:
    - finding_id: F4
      pass: 2
      disposition: dismiss
      classification: routine
      disposition_rationale: "The artifact already contains the acceptance criterion the finding asks for."
      artifact_citation: "skills/solution-authoring/SKILL.md#rule-classification-gate"
```
